title: Attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain Add Further Strain to U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire
summary_full: One person was killed in an attack on the international airport in Kuwait, local authorities said, as Iran continues to target U.S. allies in the Persian Gulf.
summary_public: One person was killed in an attack on the international airport in Kuwait, local authorities said, as Iran continues to target U.S. allies in the Persian Gulf.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran continues to target U.S. allies in the Persian Gulf.
